mapper.update: UPDATE TODO_LIST SET STATUS = '완료' WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND SUBJECT = #{subject}
mapper.insert:
SELECT TODO_LIST_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TODO_LIST ( TODO_ID, USER_ID, SUBJECT, CONTENT, DEADLINE, GOAL, STATUS ) VALUES ( #{todoId}, #{userId}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{deadline}, #{goal}, '미완료' )
mapper.select: SELECT TODO_ID, USER_ID, SUBJECT, CONTENT, DEADLINE, GOAL, STATUS, CREATED_AT FROM TODO_LIST WHERE TODO_ID = #{todoId}
SELECT * FROM TODO_LIST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = '미완료' AND (DEADLINE IS NULL OR DEADLINE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)) ORDER BY DEADLINE ASC
SELECT * FROM TODO_LIST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND (STATUS = '완료' OR DEADLINE < SYSDATE) ORDER BY DEADLINE ASC
SELECT CONTENT FROM TODO_LIST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND SUBJECT = #{subject}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TODO_LIST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND SUBJECT = #{subject}
mapper.update: UPDATE TODO_LIST SET STATUS = '완료' WHERE TODO_ID = #{todoId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
